ddls:
CREATE TABLE "freelancers" (
  "freelancer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each freelancer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the freelancer */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the freelancer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the freelancer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the freelancer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the freelancer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the freelancer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the freelancer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the freelancer */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of the freelancer */,
  "standard_rate" TEXT /* Standard hourly rate of the freelancer */,
  "weekend_rate" TEXT /* Weekend hourly rate of the freelancer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the freelancer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the freelancer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography or professional summary of the freelancer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the freelancer was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the freelancer's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freelancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the client */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the primary contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the client */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the client */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of the client */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the client's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the client was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the client's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client who created the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* List of required skills for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skillsets" (
  "skillset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skillset */,
  "freelancer_id" TEXT /* ID of the freelancer who possesses the skillset */,
  "skill" TEXT /* Name of the skillset (e.g., programming languages, writing expertise) */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the skill (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skillset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skillsets_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project */,
  "freelancer_id" TEXT /* ID of the freelancer assigned to the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "hours_worked" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked by the freelancer on the project */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES project_assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the client (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client who left the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES project_assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "freelancer_id" TEXT /* ID of the freelancer who uploaded the document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "recipient_id" TEXT /* ID of the recipient (freelancer or client) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" TEXT /* ID of the sender (freelancer or client) */,
  "recipient_id" TEXT /* ID of the recipient (freelancer or client) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id")
)
